purpose: Scrape these Echo Nest automix payloads to grow the cue-heuristic eval set from 2 -> up to 6 tracks.
destination: hag:automix_payloads/<spotify_id>.json  (gitignored, same dir/format as the existing 22,808)
acceptance: a payload is valid if json has keys [meta,track,bars,beats,sections,segments,tatums] and track.duration > last_cue_s
resolver_recipe: Mixonset title+artist -> Spotify search -> track ID -> fetch Echo Nest automix payload by ID (same pipeline that built the 22,808). Disambiguate variants by duration > last_cue_s.

targets.title: The Moodymann (Original Mix) — 2 Billion Beats
targets.note: top result is the Original; alts are Pete Herbert/Al Bradley remixes — pick the one whose duration > last_cue_s and closest to a no-suffix title

targets.title: Something Better (Original Mix) — Jamie L
targets.note: 5MC0... is explicitly 'Original Mix'; 4emH... is the plain title (likely same recording, dur 418s both)

targets.title: Driving Me Crazy (Original Mix) — Neon Transmission
targets.note: three IDs, all 313s — likely same recording across releases; any should match

no_spotify_release.title: Drifting (Original Mix) — Proviant Audio
no_spotify_release.note: No Spotify release found under this artist. Treat as no_spotify_release — do NOT title-match (false-positive risk). Permanent eval miss unless sourced elsewhere.

after_scrape: add each newly-present track to hag:tools/cue_heuristic/ground_truth.json verified_pairs (cues already extracted; ping hag to fold them in), then re-run eval.py
